title: Operator — field workhorse
motto: Knows every interrupt, every DMA, every wire — Smart Connective Iron Plate across all connections.

field_plate.name: Infinite-dimension field plate
field_plate.policy: Amplitude process over all slices — field not parallel fan-out

iron_plate.name: Smart Connective Iron Plate
iron_plate.policy: Field stack owns hardware wires — no third-party middlemen on IRQ/DMA/bus paths
iron_plate.assemblage_remaining: Iron-clad motion verdict from remaining slots after storm exclusion

arithmetic.hot_path: slot lookup + AND/SHR — no JSON walk, no delegate on board_direct wires
arithmetic.signal_clean: noise floor zeroed, labels ascii-stripped, IRQ loads capped, storm bit set

copilot_cpu.role: Plate copilot — field intelligence routes at 0ms, faster than sysfs CPU profile
copilot_cpu.hot: immutable tuple route_words in RAM — panel calls in-process, no subprocess spawn
copilot_cpu.intelligence: quality byte on route_word — field_intelligence when quality >= 192

clock.policy: Sovereign-first — signed pulses before NTP replies; monotonic-anchored UTC for all operator receipts

communication.override: Operator accepts operator_override — documents risk, still routes best path

promises: True hardware discovery — not guessed from model strings alone
IRQ affinity and storm detection on fast profile
DMA / IOMMU group visibility before any takeover
Iron plate scores every connection — secure low-level, intelligible high-level
Works with ZNetwork SHADOW until reboot
Sovereign triple clock — monotonic · realtime · micron witness — stable as sealed session time
Field NTP 2026 on loopback — pool never sole authority when sovereign-first is on
Iron plate arithmetic — route traffic board-direct at CPU instruction rate
Copilot CPU on plate — 0ms hot route, faster than physical CPU sysfs profile
